div1.entryFree: Plain-song, simple notes: the p. cuckoo, Mids. III, 1, 134.* an honest country lord may bring his p. and have an hour of hearing, H8 I, 3, 45. == the simple melody as the fundamental part of variegated music: the humour of it is too hot, that is the very p. of it. The p. is most just, H5 III, 2, 6. 7 (Nym and Pistol speaking).
